description: This script automates the validation of HTML pages using the vnu-jar validator when Java is available. It checks for Java version, constructs command-line arguments for the validator, and executes the validation process, printing relevant logs and errors.

methods.name: execFile
methods.description: Used to check Java version by executing 'java -version'.

methods.name: spawn
methods.description: Used to run the Java process with specified arguments to perform validation.
